description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: docker and kernel. In the docker stage add a docker-debian job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, defines IMAGE_TAG as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:debian_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, runs a before_script to log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then executes docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG debian and docker push $IMAGE_TAG; this job runs only when the repository Dockerfile changes and is excluded if the $NO_DOCKER_BUILD variable is set. In the kernel stage add a kernel-debian job that uses the image $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:debian_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, depends on the build-docker job, runs cd debian and make -f kernel.mk all, always uploads debian/*.log and debian/*.deb as artifacts named $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, and runs only when any of debian/Dockerfile, debian/kernel.mk, debian/kernel_settings.mk, or debian/.config change.
